patch.value: Implements net-new governance Issue #1 with compatibility-safe defaults and explicit candidate counting metrics.
Issue1: validate check-files full tracked scan mode
Add additive validate scan mode options so governance audits can scan all tracked files and report explicit candidate totals.
pm validate supports additive full tracked-file scan mode and reports candidate_total and candidate_scanned without breaking default behavior.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Net-new scope after dedupe: validate check-files needs full tracked scan mode and explicit totals.
